title: TLH Advocates advises MosChip on ₹245 crore stake acquisition in Vayavya Labs
description: MosChip Technologies Limited is set to acquire a 73% controlling stake in Vayavya Labs Private Limited for an aggregate consideration of ₹245.49 crore, subject to receipt of all requisite statutory, regulatory and other approvals.TLH, Advocates & Solicitors advised MosChip on this acquisition.The transaction team was led by Yasasvi G.V. (Partner), with support from Aditi Duggal (Senior Associate), and Associates Kapil Devnani, Shipra Agrawal and Srujana Kuchimanchi.Yasasvi GVMosChip is a lea
